arts.ttl: Newcastle United start Miguel Almiron transfer talks as one club in 'pole position'
arts.sum: Eddie Howe stated last night that he wouldn't want to lose many players in early 2025 but if a deal can open up the door to incoming business, the club may reluctantly have to sell some fringe players. The Paraguay international is attracting a lot of interest but - as reported in the United States today - Charlotte FC of the MLS are believed to be in "pole position" to sign the 30-year-old.

arts.ttl: Carabao Cup semi-final draw LIVE: Liverpool, Arsenal, Newcastle await fate after Tottenham v Manchester United
arts.sum: The semi-final draw will follow the remaining quarter-final between Tottenham and Manchester United

arts.ttl: Newcastle United's £52m transfer question may finally have been answered as warning made
arts.sum: The only blot on United's copybook midweek was not giving up a late goal to prevent a second clean sheet _ that didn't matter _ but the indiscipline that brought about bookings for Fabian Schar and Bruno which means they miss the semi-final first leg. Not if United match Ipswich for attitude, desire, and passion _ the three things where the Mags could turn the tide on a team strongly relying upon such commodities.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United big signing's scary message after 372 day wait for glory moment
arts.sum: Remember long before Tonali's dark days of being banned for illegal betting, he started his career with a goal in the 5-1 win against Aston Villa in August 2023 - with 372 days between the strikes! His career stats may show a long gap due to his 10-month ban but Eddie Howe, speaking from a backroom point of view, warned there was much more to come from Tonali as far as his incredible threat from an offensive point of view was concerned.

arts.ttl: How to buy Newcastle vs Aston Villa tickets and watch Tonali in action
arts.sum: Sandro Tonali’s Newcastle host Aston Villa at St. James’ Park on December 26: here’s how...

arts.ttl: ‘He’s the best’: Anthony Gordon says Liverpool have a player who’s still so underrated
arts.sum: Anthony Gordon was linked to Liverpool in the summer, and now, he’s hailed one of the Reds’ players. The Newcastle winger has been discussing some...

arts.ttl: Newcastle United poised to make £286m announcement as PIF deliver something not seen for a long time
Dan Burn insists Newcastle remain on path to glory despite financial restrictions
arts.sum: Newcastle are hoping to end their trophy drought by lifting the Carabao Cup this season and defender Dan Burn is feeling confident about their chances of winning

arts.ttl: Joelinton held back by team-mates as angry Newcastle United star left bloodied
arts.sum: Joelinton has been left with a cut on his mouth as well as a 'nasty' gash on his ear following Newcastle United's Carabao Cup quarter-final win against Brentford. Martin Dubravka, seeing the blood coming out of both Joelinton's ear and mouth, frantically waved Newcastle's doctor and physiotherapist on to the pitch.

arts.ttl: Bruno Guimaraes' unveils plan for Sandro Tonali as Newcastle United boos become distant memory
arts.sum: Howe's team are starting to settle down now with Tonali taking the number 6 role and Bruno pushing further forward in the number 8 position. The Brazil international and Newcastle team captain said: "He went through a difficult moment in his career but he’s always been positive.
